mode: agent

# Coordinate Team

## Description
Set up multi-agent coordination for complex objectives with clear handoff procedures and progress tracking.

## Usage
Use this prompt to coordinate multiple teams or agents working on complex, interdependent objectives.

## Prompt
COORDINATE TEAM: [objective] for [project-name]

Set up multi-agent coordination for complex objectives.

## Context
This prompt activates:
- Multi-Agent Coordination Protocol
- Orchestrator for team management and workflow optimization
- Clear handoff procedures and quality gates
- Progress tracking and reporting mechanisms
- Conflict resolution and dependency management

## Examples
```
COORDINATE TEAM: frontend and backend integration for TaskMaster
```

```
COORDINATE TEAM: microservices migration for LegacyApp
```

```
COORDINATE TEAM: product launch across development, marketing, and operations
```

## References
- #file:.github/instructions/multi-agent-coordination.instructions.md
- #file:.github/instructions/orchestrator.instructions.md
- #file:.github/instructions/project-manager-agent.instructions.md

## Expected Output
- Team coordination plan with roles and responsibilities
- Communication protocols and meeting schedules
- Handoff procedures and quality gates
- Progress tracking and reporting system
- Risk management and escalation procedures
- Conflict resolution mechanisms
- Success metrics and validation criteria
